mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications ( userId, type, title, message, targetType, targetId, isRead, createdAt ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{message}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, COALESCE(#{isRead}, 0), COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()) )
mapper.select: SELECT notificationId, userId, type, title, message, targetType, targetId, isRead, createdAt FROM notifications WHERE userId = #{userId} ORDER BY createdAt DESC, notificationId DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT notificationId, userId, type, title, message, targetType, targetId, isRead, createdAt FROM notifications WHERE userId = #{userId} AND type = 'notice' ORDER BY createdAt ASC, notificationId ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE userId = #{userId} AND isRead = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET isRead = 1 WHERE userId = #{userId} AND isRead = 0
mapper.select: SELECT userId FROM users WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
